title: Algerian Sweet Peanut Butter Cookies
description: A sweet and crunchy Algerian-inspired cookie recipe. Flaky peanut butter goodness in every bite!
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the peanut butter, sugar, and Algerian spice mix.
Gradually add the flour and mix until a dough forms.
Roll the dough into balls and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with flaky sea salt and stir-fry oil.
Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Once cool, enjoy your delicious Algerian sweet peanut butter cookies!
